calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Real Property Held By Trustee In Trust
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carlos Alvarez, via ZOOM, for Wendy Hobson, Petitioner.

The court voices its opinion that the filing of a probate code 850 petition may have been better suited for this matter. Mr. Alvarez provides advocacy for his petition. There is discussion regarding the proposed order that the court has and whether he should submit an updated proposed order or if the court should make changes to the one that is has, as needed, especially regarding striking sections 7-12. Mr. Alvarez reports that he is comfortable with the court striking sections of the proposed order that it has, as needed. After additional discussion, the court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.
